# BabakPlayer

> Android media player app that imports shared media parts from BabakCast (or WhatsApp), preserves receive order, and plays them continuously as one playlist.

## What it does

BabakPlayer is the companion receiver app for BabakCast. It accepts shared media files via Android's share intent, stores them in app-private storage preserving import order, and plays them as a continuous queue. Supports audio (mp3) and video (mp4, mkv, mov, webm), Google Cast to Nest/Chromecast devices, English and Persian (RTL) localization.

## Key features

- Share-to-import: receive files from WhatsApp or any share-capable app
- Strict import-order playback queue
- Google Cast support (Nest speakers, Chromecast)
- English and Persian (RTL) UI
- Local-first: no account, no cloud sync, no backend
- Autoplay-next with configurable seek interval

## Architecture

- Language: Kotlin
- Framework: Jetpack Compose, ExoPlayer, Google Cast SDK
- Architecture: Clean Architecture + MVVM
- Build tool: Gradle (Kotlin DSL)
- Min SDK: Android 8.0 (API 26)

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/cocodedk/BabakPlayer

- Website (Persian): https://cocodedk.github.io/BabakPlayer/fa/
